steps.title: Follow the targeting logic
steps.content: Chemical herbicides can control E. esula but may also kill harmless nearby plants. The new DNA-based approach may exclusively target E. esula by inhibiting its reproduction.

steps.title: State the consequence
steps.content: Choice A keeps the focus on herbicides, which the new approach is meant to avoid. Choice B contradicts the invasive harm described. Choice C shifts to cattle digestion rather than reproduction. Exclusive targeting would reduce E. esula while sparing other organisms. The answer is D.
